description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6 Docker image. Define stages build, validate, test, release. In the build stage add a build job that caches node_modules/ with key ${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}, stores node_modules/ as an artifact, and runs npm --version then npm install. In the validate stage add a validate job that runs npm run validate. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm test. In the release stage add a manual release job that runs only on the master branch, runs before_script npm install gitlab-ci-releaser -g and then script gitlab-ci-releaser --npm.
